title: JOYROOM 6 Pack Cable Tidy Clips Adjustable Cord Organiser Magnetic Management Self Adhesive Wire Holder for Desk, Nightstand, Charging Cables, HDMI, USB, Audio Cable, Office, Home, White
features: 【7.5mm Perfect Cable Slot Diameter】JOYROOM cable clips can hold most cables, such as phone charging cable, USB cable, HDMI thick cable, computer power cable, headphone cable, etc. Besides, the slot diameter of 7.5mm can perfectly hold a charging head as small as the original iPhone silicone charging cable without falling off, and the held cable can be pulled out smoothly for use.

【Magnetic clamp design】The unique magnetic opening and closing of the cable organiser allows you to place and remove cables with just one hand. Unlike other cable holders on the market, the JOYROOM cable organiser uses an ingenious 60° rotating shaft and magnetic locking design to help you easily remove or add a cable.

【Improved Residue-Free Acrylic Adhesive】The improved acrylic adhesive pad allows the cable management to adhere firmly to almost any flat and clean surface, such as wooden desks, glass, ceramic tiles, etc. The transparent, removable acrylic adhesive pad will not damage your desk or wall and leaves no residue after removal. A replacement adhesive pad is also included in the packaging so that the cable tidy clips can be reused.

【Makes your cables organised】JOYROOM cable management under desk could hold cables in place and keep them off the floor. More importantly, the set of 6 allows you to organise the cables in orderly ways as you wish, such as on the desk, on the table, in the corner, on the wall or on the dashboard in the car.

【Thoughtful Details】The ultimate width of 0.87 inch desk cable tidy allows it to be tight in most tight spaces. JOYROOM wire clips does not take up too much adhesive space, and it can be perfectly hidden in any small corner that is important to you. [Please follow the installation instructions: Please clean the desired surface free of dust before sticking and maintain pressure for 30 seconds to improve the adhesion of the adhesive pad. For better utilisation, we recommend a waiting time of 12-24 hours].
【JOYROOM Business Care never stops】 Contact JOYROOM support team anytime. We promise 100% to solve your problem within 12 hours.
